summary:
VISIONS OF DISEASE AND URBAN COLLAPSE: Brandon recounts a vision of people in New York suffering from massive, fluid-filled boils on their skin, mouths, and throats. He describes a subsequent blackout characterized by cold and darkness, where individuals kept warm using fires in 50-gallon drums while others looted burning buildings. This devastation spread along the East Coast from Toronto down to Miami, triggering a mass migration. Brandon also observed a massive white medical ship with a red cross docked outside New York, receiving severe medical cases transported by helicopters due to overflowing hospitals.

SYMBOLIC SIGHTINGS AND PROPHETIC WARNINGS: Brandon details a vision of a weeping mime dressed in black and white with a Laurel and Hardy hat, shedding a massive black-and-white teardrop in a silent travail cry. He also saw dogwood trees, lamb's quarters, and a lamb, noting that he was spiritually taken to Ireland and later learned these plants have medicinal properties for intestinal issues. Alongside these symbols, Brandon repeatedly heard the instruction not to take a specific vial, which he associates with the boils mentioned in Revelation 19 and the Tribulation period.

END TIMES DECEPTION AND POLITICAL THEATER: Brandon warns of an impending era of great deception, specifically stating that widespread talk of aliens is a demonic distraction designed to prepare the world for the Antichrist. He claims that when the Antichrist appears, he will attribute the disappearance of Christians to rebellion. Rejecting the notion that believers will endure the Tribulation, Brandon insists that the period of grace is closing, pinpointing September 23, 2025, as a point of no return. He also describes the current economy as a facade, predicting the removal of Jerome Powell, the collapse of the dollar to usher in a beast system, and a supernatural wealth transfer for faithful believers. Furthermore, Brandon asserts that the Biden administration allowed foreign enemies to infiltrate the United States through open borders, specifically citing a crossing point in Michigan.

TECHNOLOGICAL THREATS AND ELITE ESCAPE PLANS: Brandon shares visions of an advanced artificial intelligence race where China deploys battlefield drones equipped with 50-caliber guns and shields resembling a demonic alien head. He explains that AI technology will become so advanced it will require other AI to translate its data, warning that demonic entities and portals like CERN are embedded within these mainframe computers. While acknowledging that AI will bring medical cures, Brandon advises harnessing rather than embracing it. He also reports seeing global elites constructing a domed moon base and underground bunkers to escape upcoming plagues. Additionally, Brandon shares a vision of Joe Biden sitting abandoned and in excruciating pain in a wheelchair, nearing the end of his life, while also urging vigilance regarding retaliation for Qasem Soleimani and advising prayer for Donald Trump's children.

PHYSICAL HEALINGS AND SPIRITUAL EXHORTATION: Brandon declares physical healings over individuals suffering from PTSD, endometriosis, and severely swollen prostates, attributing these ailments sometimes to demonic spirits. He encourages followers to seek supernatural financial breakthroughs through faith and biblical principles rather than a lottery mentality, emphasizing the importance of sowing seeds into good ground. Finally, Brandon exhorts his audience to abandon superficial religious performances, return to their foundational first love for Jesus, and cultivate a deep, intimate relationship with God to survive the coming global shakings.
rawData: [December 04, 2025]-[Going over yesterday]-[https://youtu.be/aiP1Op78hE8]-[Welcome and good evening, everybody. I know it's late, so let's go over what the Lord showed us yesterday. Yesterday was heavy; we were in the Spirit. I saw the boils on the people, and they were massive—the size of half-dollars. Some of them were the size of quarters, and some like dimes. There were boils on all their skin, and they looked like they were filled with some kind of fluid. It looked almost like the membrane when you touch a stove and get a burn on your hand, like a blister. That's what this looked like on the people I saw in New York. What I thought was interesting was that it was on their mouths, in their mouths, and on their throats. In the vision, I went inside the body and could see that it was on their physical throat and inside. Then I saw a blackout. I kept hearing 'darkness,' and it was cold. I could see the buildings in New York in this vision, and all the buildings were blacked out with no power on. As there was no power, I saw people with 50-gallon drums, putting fires in them to keep warm. They had scarves and hats on—the kind that pull over your ears—and they had these coats on, keeping themselves warm by these 50-gallon drums. I was praying into that, but then I saw people in the background with buildings on fire, and they were looting what they could. As I panned out through the lens, I could see Toronto, and it spread from Toronto all the way down to Miami. Sorry, I was around some mold today and I'm coughing a little bit, but all is well. I've got this; it's not a virus, it's because of the mold. I hate mold. I saw it go all the way down the East Coast, and as I saw this, I saw mass migration again; people were leaving. I saw a massive white medical ship with a huge red cross on it parked outside of New York. The hospitals were full, and they were transporting people by helicopter and other ways to this big boat. The ship was docked, but people were being transported to it, which I thought was interesting because you only take a helicopter ride if it's very serious and you're not about to make it. They don't give you a helicopter ride just to give you a helicopter ride. The other part was I saw a mime. I saw a white-faced clown with blackest mascara around his eyes and teardrops—the small part of a teardrop that would drop on your cheek, kind of like what gang members do. This was a massive teardrop that started at the top and went down like this; it had a black liner and white in the middle, and his eyes were blacked out. This was on both eyes. He was wearing a black and white outfit with a hat like Laurel and Hardy wear; it was a circle with a little dome, a white band around it, and a flower coming off the side. He was making a bent-over motion and was crying without sound—a mime. He looked like he was sobbing and making a noise, but with no sound. If you were to put noise to it, it would be a travail cry. I know that was symbolic; there's something to this. Not everything is black and white; it's a metaphor. That's what I'm trying to tell you. Then I saw dogwood trees and I heard 'dogwood, dogwood.' I knew it was symbolic of something else. A lot of you are researchers, and you say, Brandon, that Jesus was crucified on a dogwood tree. I don't know how people know that unless it says it in the Word and I'm just ignorant of it, but it was interesting. I saw dogwood blossoms. I knew the Lord, when I heard the Father say 'dogwood' and 'lamb's quarters, lamb's quarters.' I saw a little white flower and I saw the lamb. Then I went in the Spirit to Ireland. The Lord said, 'Look at Ireland.' So I was looking at Ireland and thinking, 'What are you trying to say about this?' A lot of people sent Diana and me emails saying dogwood and lamb's quarters are for your intestines and parasites. The bark helps your stomach problems. There are medicinal purposes for these lamb's quarters. I thought that was interesting. Praying into that, why is the Lord talking about this? He said, 'Don't take it.' The Lord kept saying, 'Don't take it. Don't take it. Don't take it.' So I said, 'Don't take what?' I saw a vial again. Then somebody gave me Revelation 19. Son, could you pull that up? I believe it was Revelation 19. It said the boils come on the people. If mama were here—she's busy—but the scripture talks about in Revelation the boils coming on the people after they take the mark. Maybe, just me speaking into it, I was having a vision of the Tribulation again. I think it's interesting as we're praying because the Lord kept saying, 'Don't take it.' Well, don't take what? The mark? Was it the mark? I don't add to or take away from anything, but I think it's interesting because, lately, the things the Lord is showing us—He talked about Mystery Babylon and the major shakings that are coming. I believe the closer we get to the Tribulation, the more the Lord is letting us see into it to pray. Regardless, I want to say this: God wishes that none should perish but all come to repentance—all of us, even the people who are going through the Tribulation. There's always a way of escaping every area of our life. Even to the point of praying for our brothers and sisters who get left—the unbelievers in the Tribulation. Could we be interceding for them? I don't doubt it; I believe that's how merciful God is. But are we getting that close to it? I'm telling you, Jesus Christ is coming. You must know Him as your Lord and personal Savior. You're running out of time. The urgency of the hour—it's time for the Body of Christ to wake up. Jesus is coming. Many of you are asleep; many are not awake for what's about to happen on this earth. The signs of the times are about to heighten, doubling and tripling. It's like the Lord showing me anointing on ministries; they're doubling and tripling. If you just spend time with the Father and seek Him daily—not just whenever it's convenient—finding that intimacy, going back to the first love, going back to what you fell in love with, that tugging at your heart. 'Oh, Father, how are you today? I want to know You more. I want to fall more in love with the Lord. Please, God, create in me a clean heart.' Stripping all this stuff off of me that would be ungodly before You. What is holding me back from coming to the greater glory? What is it inside of me that You see, Lord, that is repulsive to You? To be on that potter's wheel and be molded and made every day, staying from glory to glory to cultivate and accelerate. The Lord keeps talking to me about 2026. And even, you know, just bringing about the alien stuff. I am telling you, ladies and gentlemen, great fearful sights you will see that will bring you to your knees. We are about to have great deception beyond anybody's comprehension for what we are about to see. It is the plan of the enemy. One of the major things Jesus told me when I went to heaven and I was on the edge of it, he said to me, "Brandon, right before I come, one of the major things you will see in this earth is that they will talk about aliens a lot." This was in a visitation I had on July 6th of 2014. The Lord said to me, "There will be many on the news all the time talking about aliens, ships, and things like that." I heard somebody say that Rick Renner was talking about the aliens in the water and the Nephilim. Ladies and gentlemen, it is about desensitizing you to what is about to happen. The main thing the Antichrist will say when he comes on the scene—when I told you he comes before, he stands in an Oval Office area with a red carpet behind him. Does anybody remember me saying he stands in a red carpet area with all these lights and the stage, and he tells the Christians they were taken because of rebellion? Now, I have my own family members; some of them say they don't even believe in the rapture of the church. They don't believe any of this stuff; they think we are all drinking bad Kool-Aid. I am trying to tell you all, we are not appointed unto wrath. Jesus Christ is not a wife beater. There is nothing you can say to convince me that we are going to walk through the tribulation. Most of it is like the people who think God is going to knock the snot out of his kids that he loves. He is not God. If we being evil give good gifts to our children, how much more does the heavenly Father give good gifts to those that love him? That is, I believe, Matthew 7. I want to encourage you all today. God is not a wife beater. God is not beating his bride. He is not up there going, "Let's punish you; let you go through some hell because you need to." That is not our God. God is a rewarder of those who diligently seek him, love him, and follow him. So, I just want to encourage you all today to get off the tribulation train. I don't believe it. Everything I have seen, when I went to the tribulation, the ones that were left were like the five virgins that didn't have their lamps full of oil. It was not the ones that were full of oil. There were ten; five were ready, five were not. Which one are you? Is your lamp full of oil, or are you one that is empty, saying, "You know what? I like living in the world. I like partying, I like having premarital sex, I like going out and looking at bad things on the internet, I like going to the strip club or drinking or whatever." Are you sold out to Jesus? It is time to get real and be sold out to Jesus, to be all-in. I say it over and over again on this channel, but I have that urgency again tonight to warn you: we are running out of time. Unless a man is born again, he cannot enter the kingdom of God. Who is influencing you? What is pulling you away from it? Cut it off. What speaks louder in your life that is against the Word and against the Father coming up higher? Cut it out of your life. It is a cancer. Only seek Jesus. It is time. The Lord tells me, "Brandon, you must tell them and shake them out of their slumber all the time." He warns me, "Tell them I am coming, Brandon. Tell them there is no time." You say, "What does that mean to you, Brandon?" Even if it is five years, folks, on the scale of eternity, that is nothing. It is grace if he gives us five more years. It is grace if he gives us ten. I don't see it any more than that. I am believing for the next three years during Trump's term, during the next cycle. But I still see right now praying for JD Vance in 2028, and I have seen clearly into 2032. But no man knows the day or the hour. We know the signs of the times as we watch the fig tree. So I want to encourage you today to keep your lamp full. He could come back tomorrow. I believe he will come on Rosh Hashanah. I believe that is the timeframe he will come in, the September timeframe. Everybody expected it back on September 23rd, and I warned you over and over again, they were missing it. That was the point of no return. He said, "You have entered into the point of no return of September 2025, the 23rd." He said that was the point of no return as labor pains upon a woman. Where are we in the labor pains? He said, "Brandon, you are at the point of no time for an epidural." So you ladies that have had a baby recently, you know there is a point in time where there is no more time for an epidural, and that is where we are. It is about time to push. You have dilated to a ten; it is time to push. That is where we are in these end times. As of the 23rd of September, the point of no return. What does that mean to you? Well, the Lord said this is the time. It is the time that he said, "I am not out of mercy, I am out of time." We are at the point of push, and the greatest revival, the greatest end-time harvest of souls this world has ever known, is about to hit this planet. But he is calling all hands on deck. As we saw last night, Jesus was walking amongst the wheat, and the wheat was bowing down before him. He was feeling the wheat through his fingers and he was weighing it in his hands. He looked at me in the spirit and he said, "Brandon, the harvest is plentiful, son, and the laborers are few. Help me tonight." We had 90 plus salvations. 12 people in South Korea got born again. Buddhists came to Jesus last night, 12 of them, all to the glory of God. It is wonderful when 12 Buddhists give their hearts to Jesus Christ, people that did not know him at all. Over the last couple of days here, we have had well over 500 salvations. People know inside that something is up. There is an urgency of the hour. It is kind of like an animal that knows there is about to be a major earthquake or a tsunami; they always run for the hills because they sense danger is coming. There are many of you, they call it a sixth sense, whatever; I believe the Holy Ghost is inside of every single one of us, tugging at your heart. Even if you're not born again, he's at the door of your heart knocking; you're running out of time. So they come and they watch us and they pray with us because a lot of them want to know about crypto. A lot of people always ask me, "What are the five pillars, Brandon?" I'm not a financial adviser. I can tell you what I've seen in the spirit, but it's only what I feel the Holy Spirit has told me. And if it's off and it's wrong—and I'm flesh—you know what, we can miss it. I'm not telling you what to do with your money because you'd be going, "Brandon, you told me to do this." I did not tell you to do anything; I told you to pray about it. I am human and I can miss it. I believe the Lord has shown me this. But just because I'm flesh, just like anybody, we all can miss it. We all come short of the glory of God. Everybody has issues. And I could be off on a bad day because I had some bad pizza. I'm telling you these things, but when it comes to financial stuff, you need to take it to God in prayer and ask the Holy Spirit what he tells you to do. Whatever he tells you to do, do it. But I can tell you what I see in the visions. I see the five pillars, things like that. But what I really try to do is bring bait to bring you here to tell you that Jesus Christ is coming. You want to know about crypto? My heart is to tell you that you don't want to go to hell. You're running out of time. You want to fill your pockets, but you can't take it with you. There's a plague coming, ladies and gentlemen. There is an enemy that has infiltrated our nation because of the Biden administration. There are many terrorists in this nation. All those flies need to die. I had a bug zapper. There are enemies that have flooded our nation because we had open borders for four years of a Biden administration. Millions of people crossed over illegally. But many of them were a Trojan horse that came in here, and they could not get us, the Lord said, through a D-Day like it was in World War II when we invaded Germany. So they infiltrated through our borders, through the north and the south. I can even tell you where they crossed in; I can show you deep down. I know where they came in by Michigan. I saw a group of ten men come across the border of Michigan. I can tell you what they were wearing. I can tell you what they were driving. I don't know their license plate number, but I saw it deep. I even know the crossing points, and that was for us to pray over. It's not all glory. It's not anything about Brandon. But I try to bring these things to you all because I have such an urgency every time I do these videos. Even tonight I was like, "Do I do it?" I was like, "Man, it's late. I talked way too long." But iron sharpens iron; that anointing was on there and I could feel the glory. I can feel the presence of the Lord, and even if it's just one person who gets born again tonight, it was worth doing this video so late. I don't want to keep you very long—it's 24 minutes—but I had such a stirring all day long to keep praying for this nation, to pray for the nations of this world. It's not just about America. They are having big meetings today again, and they're talking about things—talking about kicking the guy in Venezuela out. Trump's saying all this stuff, airstrikes, things like that. A leak with a new Watergate. They're calling it a new Watergate again. And they're saying all these things. These are words that I hear. Political theater—political theater is already starting and we're not even in 2026 yet. There will be great political theater in the days ahead—great distractions. The interest rates will go down. He's warned me about that, and in my opinion—based on what the Lord has shown me concerning January—Jerome Powell will be out and they're going to try to pump this economy. The Lord told me personally: ride the wave. It's a pig with lipstick. The economy is a pig with lipstick. It had mascara on, its cheeks were pink, and it was marching around with Trump, and he was telling you everything is good. As much as I love him and I pray for him all the time, we all know that we're almost $40 trillion in the hole. You're not pulling that out. It's just not going to happen. Do you know why? Because the dollar has to go away for the beast system to rise. And we're truly at that point. America is not coming back. Jesus is. America is going through a window of opportunity for a wealth transfer for the body of Christ, for the 1%. Not everybody's going to walk in this because you don't know how to manage what you have. And God is not going to give you supernatural wealth if you can't take care of and tithe off of the dollar that you have. If you're not faithful with a little, he will not make you ruler over much. He will not cast his pearls before swine. That's why he tells me all the time, "Don't cast pearls before swine." But he will not give the treasures in the fountain of the deep—the dark, hidden treasures, the major things—to the ones that are not close to his ear and his heart. He's doing that to the ones that will listen to him and love him. I don't seek his hand; I seek his face daily. I want so much to follow him and to be close to him in these last days. And it's important. That's why I went to the church tonight and was sitting listening; the whole time I couldn't pay attention because I saw and I was looking at what's coming: a storm. So I listened and I heard bits and pieces, but I was caught up in the spirit even as I was sitting there, and I said, "There's something so heavy. I feel it. There's a storm." And the Lord keeps saying to me, "Everything that you know, everything that you experience is going to change in a 24-hour period." A great shaking to awaken is coming. But it's on your doorstep now. And D-Day has been commissioned. Do you understand? He keeps talking about D-Day, the beaches of Normandy and all things like that. He references war a lot. I guess that's it; 25 minutes. And then you saw the drone. You saw AI. Oh, I saw an AI race. And the Lord said, "Because of the Biden administration, you're behind China." And I saw China making new kinds of drones. But these were not drones that were in the sky; they were drones for the battlefield so that they would not have to bring their soldiers out, so they would have drone wars. And I saw a circle that looked like the movie Alien—those demonic movies back then. It had the alien with the long evil-looking face from that spooky movie. I don't reference that, but it's the only thing I can say. I've seen the pictures of it: the alien head. That's what this drone looked like. They had 50-caliber guns with tracks and they were using drone warfare for battle. And China was—there it is. The alien. Do you see that? That's the way the shield looked. That's so demonic. "You want to show it?" "Yeah, sure." "Not the tail." "No, it only zoomed in when I'm trying to fix it." "That's it. See?" "Yeah." "Do you see it?" That's the way the shield looked on this drone. Now take it off. I don't want to look at it. That's the way the shield looked on that drone. And I believe it was symbolic. It was titanium-looking and had tracks. It had black tracks and it was like a four-wheel drive. They were using these 50-caliber guns and they were shooting this stuff from it. I thought that was interesting. But the Lord was showing me the AI race. And I saw AI again. A big, new industrial revolution with AI is what the Lord is showing me. I keep seeing these rooms with supercomputers, major computers, and the Lord said the information is coming to them so quickly through AI that they can't even translate it fast enough with a human mind. They can type in what they want to know about. What we have with ChatGPT and Gemini (Google) is yesterday's stuff; it's no good. The Lord said they have new technology that's so advanced that even their minds—trying to comprehend what the computer is saying—will need AI to translate it. Do you understand? AI will have to translate the AI; that's how advanced the technology has become. There are cures for cancer, diabetes, Alzheimer's, dementia, and a lot of these things. People go, "Well, yeah, it's Ivermectin." No, it's something more than Ivermectin. This is something more advanced. But the Lord said He was bringing forth new cures and new things that would go alongside that. People would trust AI in the days ahead. What did I tell you was behind AI? There was a massive demon that was embedded into the computers that you're talking to that had digital writing, and the demon was taking over the AI with the digital code moving. It had horns on its head and I saw it. It was embedded into this mainframe of a major computer, but it was a dimension all in itself. AI is a dimension all in itself when it comes to the level of technological advancement that it is. It's endless. And the Lord showed me people putting in these codes through CERN and these demonic portals; you're talking to demonic spirits. And that's why I tried to warn you all. Should you use AI? The Lord said: harness it, don't embrace it. You'll not be able to get around not using it, for it is the future. Harness it, don't embrace it. I thought that was an interesting word. I saw a base on the moon, which I thought was way out there. I saw it dug inside of the moon with a dome over it. It looked like a lid. I don't know how they could do that, but there was a base on the moon. And when the plague took place, elite people were trying to get out of the earth to go to the moon. I'm telling you, that's what I saw. Others were trying to hide in their bunkers deep in the earth trying to get away because they didn't want to be exposed to the viruses and the things that are about to take place. There is a level of them trying to preserve themselves that is going to be over the top. But I told you the great deceptions are coming. I even saw an alien talking to a reporter. I have to clarify that there are no aliens; these are demonic spirits. The Bible says we can entertain angels unaware. You can entertain devils unaware. If we can entertain the holy angels unaware, we can entertain demonic spirits unaware: fallen angels. Good is good, bad is bad. One tries to imitate God's stuff. God is always good and God is always great. You all need to know great days of deception are coming. You need to be spiritually discerning. I told you, test the prophetic words. Don't just believe every prophet that calls himself a prophet. You must judge the word inside of your spirit. If it doesn't line up with the Word, run. The Bible is God speaking to you. You must get the Word of God inside of your heart so that it says: I'll make it a lamp unto my feet and a light unto my path. I will hide His word in my heart that I might not sin against Him, that I might not fall by the wayside by demonic temptation or familiar spirits. My sheep will hear My voice and a stranger's voice I will not follow. You must have a revelation of the Word of God and this must become priority in your life. You must abide in His word. Jesus said, "Apart from the Father, I can do nothing." If He couldn't do anything without the Father and the Holy Ghost, how much more do you need Him? I crave Him more than I crave something to eat or drink. Do you want to make a change in your life? Make the change now. Make your New Year's resolution now. Don't wait for 2026 to start. Find Him now. Those that seek Me will find Me. Those that knock, the door will be opened to them. You must find Jesus. You must have a relationship with Jesus. I saw the silos, I saw the glory, I saw the places that Jesus has for us to walk in the greater glory. He made it so a five-year-old can do it. I saw a chip in the vision last night that looked like a motherboard and behind this motherboard was glowing with a red light. It's symbolic; it's getting hot. AI technology is going to get really hot. It's going to become a major thing in 2026. Pray over our President. And then He told me, "Remember, do not forget Qasem Soleimani, for they want retaliation still for his assassination, and they want revenge still." And the Lord said, "Pray for Don Jr., pray for Eric, pray for Trump's children." Joe Biden was sitting in a wheelchair in excruciating pain. He had a Burberry blanket laying across his lap—I could see the plaid check with the red stripe—and he was in a bathrobe, but he was in excruciating pain. He was bending over grabbing his stomach and his groin area, and the Lord said his days are numbered. He's about to depart this earth. I saw him dying, but the Lord said, "Pray for his soul. He doesn't know me." People go, "Well, he's Catholic. He's this." The Lord said, "Pray for his soul. He does not know me." He was all alone; everybody had abandoned him. I could see him in excruciating pain looking out a window. It was cold, and he was leaning over in so much pain. It grieved me. All the people and all the stuff for so long—even just a couple of months ago, he was president—and the Lord showed me he's all alone. His son wasn't around, his wife wasn't even in the room. He was in a room by himself. It's like everybody had abandoned him and he was sitting there all alone. To be at the top of the pinnacle of the world as the President of the United States of America and yet be so alone. Many of you are like that—not president, but you used to be at the top of your game. You were the best at work, the best at your job. You might have been really good at AI or technology or whatever, but now you're coming to the end of your life. You're older and you're all alone. If you were to die tonight, where would you spend eternity? You're watching this and you just clicked on it because you thought, "Well, what is that old guy saying again with the bald head?" But the Holy Spirit is drawing you here. He's knocking at the door of your heart. I'm here to tell you, you may not have another opportunity. Tonight might be your last chance. You might be young and you're here and you could die tomorrow. None of us are promised tomorrow. Ask Charlie Kirk when you get to heaven. He probably didn't believe he was going to die that day, but he went home. He's with the Father now. Nobody knows their number. Nobody knows the day. But if you were to die today, where would you spend eternity? The very shoes you put on today to go to work—I say it all the time—the undertaker might be taking them off that night. I really want you to seriously seek your heart tonight. I keep telling you and I present this to you all the time. There are new faces here all the time; there are 4,700 new faces here tonight. I don't know how many of you all are familiar with this channel, but we're here to tell you Jesus Christ is coming. And if you're here tonight and you do not know Him—more importantly, does He know you? Where will you spend eternity? If you were to die today, where would you go? There's a heaven to gain and a hell to shun. Ladies and gentlemen, you're running out of time. I just want to say a simple prayer with you right now. With all the stuff that I'm telling you—earthquakes in diverse places—who knows? There could be a massive earthquake tonight. Hit the coast of Oregon. Tsunami wave. You're in your apartment complex or your million-dollar home on the beach. The wave comes in, totally destroys it, washes you out to sea, and you die. You'd be worth millions of dollars, but none of it matters if you don't know Jesus Christ as your Lord and personal savior. You could be worth billions living at the top of the high-rise. You might have all this money, all this fame, all these relationships, and everything that you could possibly want, but you are as lost as a goose in the fog because you don't know Jesus Christ. You might say, "I don't need Jesus," until you take your last breath. Because at that moment, there's no more repenting. To be absent from the body is to be present with the Lord, or you're in hell. One lady said, "Brandon, do you believe in purgatory?" Not even a little bit. You're either standing in front of the devil or you're going to be standing in front of your Maker.
